title: hyoscyamus boveanus
intro: Hyoscyamus boveanus, also known as Bovean Henbane, is a plant species within the nightshade family that contains tropane alkaloids, particularly scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which are responsible for its medicinal and toxic properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and antispasmodic properties, helping to alleviate pain and reduce muscle spasms. In herbal preparations, Hyoscyamus boveanus is typically used to treat conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and menstrual cramps, as well as to induce sweating and relieve coughs. However, due to its toxicity, it should be used with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
